src/main/java/com/whl/spring/controller/.general_idea: Replace Apache Commons IO file operations with Java NIO APIs to remove the external dependency.
Replace Apache Commons IO stream copying with Java NIO Files.copy for downloading files.
Use Spring's MediaTypeFactory to detect content types instead of hardcoding application/octet-stream.
Refactor file path resolution to use a dedicated method with System.getProperty instead of ServletContext.
Replace manual 404 text response with a forward to a 404 view for better separation of concerns.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.1.14 to support JDK 21 and access latest features.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 11.0.0 which is required for JDK 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade Jakarta Servlet API to 6.1.0 to match Tomcat 11 and Jakarta EE 10 specifications.
Upgrade JUnit to 5.11.2 (Jupiter) to replace the legacy JUnit 4 dependency.
Upgrade Jackson to 2.18.0 for security patches and JDK 21 compatibility.
Upgrade Commons IO to 2.17.0 for maintenance and compatibility.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure proper compilation with JDK 21.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.10.1 for better JDK 21 documentation generation.
Upgrade Maven Source Plugin to 3.3.1 for maintenance.
Upgrade Maven War Plugin to 3.4.0 for maintenance.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin 3.1.0 for build script execution capabilities.
Add Maven Dependency Plugin 3.8.0 for dependency management tasks.
Add Tomcat Embed Jasper dependency to support JSP compilation in embedded Tomcat.
Switch Maven repositories from internal Nexus to public Aliyun mirror for better accessibility.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new project identity.
Introduce ${revision} property for unified version management across the project.

.gitignore.general_idea: Simplified gitignore rules by removing redundant target/build exclusions for source directories.
Added standard IDE, OS, and project-specific directories to gitignore.

README.md.general_idea: Update the repository title in the README to reflect the specific demo project name.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from '# spring' to '# spring-demo'

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation instructions for handling provided-scope dependencies in the classpath.
README.md.human_impl: Added line: `Add dependencies with "provided" scope to classpath`

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/index..general_idea: Add missing head and title elements to the JSP template to ensure valid HTML structure.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/test.j.general_idea: Replace the reference to the unminified jQuery script with the minified version to reduce payload size.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Configure a custom error page for HTTP 404 Not Found responses.
Configure a custom error page for HTTP 500 Internal Server Error responses.
